## Checklist

- [ ] Frontmatter `name` matches folder name
- [ ] `description` includes **Triggers:** with quoted phrases
- [ ] No secrets, private URLs, or org-specific assumptions
- [ ] Ran `python3 scripts/convert-to-claude.py --in-repo --force --write-map` (if `.cursor/skills/` changed)
- [ ] Validated all `SKILL.md` files have frontmatter (`---`)
- [ ] Updated `SKILL_INVENTORY.md` if adding new skill paths
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md`
